The funny thing is, that's a fairly accurate description. Underneath the world's oceans, miles and miles of fiber-optic cables send packets of information from one location to the next, serving as the backbone of the internet as know it. This infrastructure is de

title: The Race to Fuel a Nuclear Energy Comeback
title_cn: 推动核能卷土重来的竞赛
summary: Nuclear power is attempting a comeback, but producing the necessary fuel is complex. From mining to enrichment, can new technologies and supply chains scale to power the next generation of reactors? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Odd Lots: The Undersea Cables That Connect the World (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：连接世界的海底电缆（播客）
summary: In 2006, then-Senator Ted Stevens coined an infamous term for how to understand the internet: It’s a “series of tubes.” The funny thing is, that’s a fairly accurate description. Underneath the world’s oceans, miles and miles of fiber-optic cables send packets of information from one location to the next, serving as the backbone of the internet as know it. This infrastructure is delicate, too: Memorably, a 2022 volcanic eruption cut off the island of Tonga from web access for an extended period o

title: China AI Stocks Surge as Huang’s Visit Boosts H200 Supply Bets

title: French Jobless Rate Jumps Above 8% for First Time Since 2021
title_cn: 法国失业率自 2021 年以来首次跃升至 8% 以上
summary: French unemployment unexpectedly rose to the highest level in five years, adding to signs the euro area’s second largest economy was already on a weak footing when the Iran war began.

title: Tech Rebound Lifts Stocks as Oil Rally Hits Pause: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 石油涨势暂停，科技股反弹提振股市：市场总结
summary: Dip buyers drove technology stocks higher, with traders betting that a record-breaking rally in chipmakers has further room to run. Oil broke a run of three straight daily gains even as the Strait of Hormuz remained shut.

summary: ABN Amro Bank NV reported quarterly profit  on surging fee income, easily beating expectations and sending shares higher.

title: Uzbek State Fund Rises in London Debut After $604 Million IPO
title_cn: 乌兹别克国家基金在伦敦首次公开募股 6.04 亿美元后上涨
summary: Uzbekistan’s national investment fund rose in its London trading debut, after the government sold a $604 million stake.

title: The Rapid Rise of China’s Missile Stockpiles
title_cn: 中国导弹库存迅速增加
summary:
China’s missile buildup runs on a vast network of about 80 firms. Bloomberg analysis shows record revenues and rising civilian involvement, expanding Beijing’s reach just as US stockpiles are diminished by the Iran war.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Greece Weighs Further Early Repayment of Bailout Era Loans
title_cn: 希腊考虑进一步提前偿还救助时代贷款
summary: Greece is looking into repaying even more of its bailout loans ahead of schedule this year, a person familiar with the matter said.

title_cn: 摩根士丹利认为人民币升势放缓，与多头背离
summary: Morgan Stanley sees room for the Chinese yuan to climb further, but disagrees with more bullish views that the currency is significantly undervalued.

title: India FX Buffer Is Still Robust to Defend Rupee, Economists Say
title_cn: 经济学家表示，印度外汇缓冲仍足以捍卫卢比
summary: India’s foreign-exchange reserves remain strong enough to defend its currency against the Iran-war driven oil shock, with buffers well above stress levels seen during the taper tantrum, according to economists.

title: Siemens to Buy Back €6 Billion Shares Against Tough Backdrop
title_cn: 西门子将在困难背景下回购 60​​ 亿欧元股票
summary: Siemens AG will repurchase as much as €6 billion ($7 billion) of shares after orders climbed against a difficult geopolitical backdrop including tariffs and rising inflation.

title: Trump to Meet Xi for High-Stakes US-China Summit
title_cn: 特朗普将与习近平举行高风险的美中峰会
summary: US President Donald Trump is set to arrive in Beijing for his first China visit in a decade, seeking to press Xi Jinping on trade and the Iran war. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intertek Inclined to Recommend EQT’s Final £9.2 Billion Offer
title_cn: Intertek倾向于推荐殷拓集团92亿英镑的最终收购要约
summary: Intertek Group Plc is leaning toward recommending a fourth and final takeover offer from private equity firm EQT AB.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 5/13/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 5/13/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Family Offices Build Stake in Miner After Stock Soars 900%
title_cn: 矿业公司股价飙升 900% 后家族办公室增持股份
summary: For decades, the risky world of early-stage mining ventures was the playground of institutional funds and commodity trading houses. But after a more than 900% rally in a little-known Canadian potash developer last year, a new class of investors is moving in: family offices.

title: Japanese Funds Dump Most US Debt Since 2022 as Fed Wagers Flip
title_cn: 随着美联储押注翻转，日本基金抛售了 2022 年以来的大部分美国债务
summary: Japanese investors sold the most US sovereign bonds in almost four years as a jump in oil prices led to an abrupt turnaround in Federal Reserve policy bets.

title: Modi’s Belt-Tightening Push Raises Pessimism Around India Stocks
title_cn: 莫迪勒紧裤腰带引发印度股市悲观情绪
summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s push to curb fuel and gold consumption has added to uncertainty in India’s already weak stock markets, raising concerns that moves meant to protect the economy may end up cooling overall spending.

title: MAIA: Presight CEO: UAE Leaders in AI Adoption
title_cn: MAIA：Presight 首席执行官：阿联酋在人工智能采用方面处于领先地位
summary: UAE-based AI company Presight has reported 1Q revenue up 22% y/y. The company says national infrastructure and mission-critical platforms remained fully operational during the regional instability. Thomas Pramotedham, CEO of Presight spoke to Bloomberg’s Horizons Middle East and Africa anchor Joumanna Bercetche on their performance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korea Benchmark Bond Yield Tops 4% as Rate-Hike Bets Grow
title_cn: 随着加息押注增加，韩国基准债券收益率突破 4%
summary: South Korean bond yields rose to their highest level since November 2023 as an oil shock tied to the Iran conflict leads traders to expect bigger interest rate hikes.

title: Oil Slips After Three-Day Gain With Iran Peace Talks at Impasse
title_cn: 伊朗和谈陷入僵局，油价连续三天上涨
summary: Oil dropped after rising almost 8% over the past three sessions as a resolution to the Middle East conflict remains elusive, with Iranian exports showing further strain from a US Naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Nidec Shares Tumble After Scandal Spreads to Product Quality
title_cn: 产品质量丑闻蔓延后日本电产股价暴跌
summary: Nidec Corp. is facing renewed investor backlash after disclosing quality control misconduct involving motors and other products, compounding the challenges confronting a once-admired manufacturer on top of accounting problems and the exit of its charismatic founder.

title: HSBC Says Momentum Signals for Stocks Are 'Max Bullish'
title_cn: 汇丰银行称股市动能信号“最大看涨”
summary: Max Kettner, chief multi-asset strategist at HSBC, discusses the outlook for equities and whether there is a risk of a pullback. "All of our positioning stuff, both systematic and discretionary, is so far away from sending a sales signal," he tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank Profit Jumps, Emboldens Masa Son to Bet More on OpenAI
title_cn: 软银利润大幅增长，鼓励孙正义加大对 OpenAI 的投资
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. reported a surge in quarterly profit due to valuation gains on its OpenAI investment, boosting confidence at the Japanese company to bet even more on the ChatGPT maker.

title: Trump-Xi Summit: Nvidia CEO Joins Air Force One to China | Daybreak Europe 5/13/2026
title_cn: 特习峰会：英伟达首席执行官随空军一号访问中国 |欧洲黎明 2026 年 5 月 13 日
summary:
On today's show, Nvidia co-founder Jensen Huang joined US President Donald Trump on his visit to China as a last-minute addition, thrusting AI and technology into the spotlight before a high-stakes summit in Beijing. Trump also said his focus with President Xi will be trade, not the Iran War.

In a Bloomberg Scoop, Anthropic is in early talks with investors to raise at least $30 billion in fresh financing, according to people familiar with the matter, setting the stage for what could be its largest funding round yet.

And Britain braces for another day of political drama. Keir Starmer is due to confront one of his main rivals at a behind-closed-doors meeting on Wednesday morning, before King Charles III will unveil the government's agenda for the year ahead, as Starmer fights for his future in Downing Street.

Today's guest: Tim Bale, Professor of Politics, Queen Mary University of London & Siemens CEO, Roland Busch. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anduril Valued at $61 Billion in Round Led by Thrive, Andreessen
title_cn: Anduril 在 Thrive、Andreessen 领投的一轮融资中估值 610 亿美元
summary: Anduril Industries Inc. is being valued at $61 billion in a $5 billion funding round led by Thrive Capital and Andreessen Horowitz, the defense technology company announced on Wednesday.

title: Anthropic Warns Investors to Avoid Certain Secondary Market Sellers
title_cn: Anthropic 警告投资者避开某些二级市场卖家
summary: Anthropic PBC identified a number of secondary marketplaces as unauthorized sellers of the company’s shares, telling investors that buying the stock won’t work.

title: Deutsche Telekom Slightly Bumps 2026 Outlook After US Growth
title_cn: 德国电信因美国经济增长而略微调高 2026 年前景
summary: Deutsche Telekom AG, Europe’s biggest phone carrier, slightly raised its guidance after recording growth in Germany and its US arm, T-Mobile US Inc.

title: Anthropic in Early Talks to Raise $30 Billion
title_cn: Anthropic 正在进行融资 300 亿美元的早期谈判
summary: Anthropic is in early talks with investors to raise at least $30 billion in fresh financing, according to people familiar with the matter. The Claude maker is in discussions to raise the new capital at a valuation of more than $900 billion, not including the investment, said the people. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Siemens CEO Says Share Buyback Is a 'Good Thing to Do'
title_cn: 西门子首席执行官表示股票回购是一件“好事”
summary: Siemens CEO Roland Busch discusses the outlook for orders, profit guidance and supply chain "uncertainties" stemming from the war in the Middle East. Speaking on Bloomberg Television, he also discusses artificial intelligence regulation in Europe and plans for a €6 billion ($7 billion) share buyback. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korea President Clarifies Policy Chief’s ‘Citizen Dividend’ Post
title_cn: 韩国总统澄清政策负责人的“公民红利”职位
summary: Korean President Lee Jae Myung said his adviser’s viral post about redistributing profits from the AI boom was meant to start a broader public debate about how a potential tax windfall should be used.

title: Metis TechBio Shares Jump 185% as Hot HK Debuts Extend Run
title_cn: Metis TechBio 股价大涨 185%，香港上市热潮延续
summary: Shares of Metis TechBio Co, a biotechnology company using artificial intelligence to deliver and formulate drugs, surged as much as 185% in their Hong Kong debut on Wednesday, adding to a string of first-day pops in the city.

title: Alibaba, Tencent AI Bets Face ‘Show Me the Profits’ Scrutiny
title_cn: 阿里巴巴和腾讯的人工智能押注面临“让我看看利润”审查
summary: Chinese investors are heading into the earnings season demanding proof that billions in AI spending by tech giants is paying off.

title: Memory Crunch Deepens Chasm Between Stock Winners and Losers
title_cn: 内存紧缩加深了股票赢家和输家之间的鸿沟
summary: The worsening shortage in global memory chips due to the artificial intelligence buildout is driving a widening gulf in corporate results and stock performances.

title: Australia Capital Gains Tax Reform Risks Startups, PC Chief Says
title_cn: PC负责人表示，澳大利亚资本利得税改革给初创企业带来风险
summary: Australia’s plan to scrap a capital gains tax discount risks “unintended consequences” for the startup sector, even as the budget delivered a credible package of productivity reforms, said Danielle Wood, chair of the Productivity Commission.

title: Investors Should Focus on AI's Long-Term Value Migration: JPMorgan AM
title_cn: 摩根大通：投资者应关注人工智能的长期价值迁移
summary: Joanna Shen of JPMorgan Asset Management says the firm believes we are "in the early adoption AI phase." She tells Bloomberg Television that AI agents are "the first technology in decades that can supercharge the labor inputs." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sea’s Shares Surge 13% After Gains in Asian Fight With Alibaba
title_cn: Sea 股价在与阿里巴巴的亚洲大战中上涨 13%
summary: Sea Ltd.’s profit beat sent its shares up the most in nine months, signaling growing investor confidence in its strategy to fend off hard-charging rivals like Alibaba Group Holding Ltd.

title: Samsung Labor Talks Collapse as Risks to Chip Supplies Rise
title_cn: 由于芯片供应风险上升，三星劳资谈判破裂
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. failed to reach a last-minute wage agreement with its largest labor union, heightening the risk of a strike that could disrupt operations at the world’s largest memory chipmaker.

title: 1789 Capital’s Abrahimzadeh on SpaceX, Cerebras Ipos
title_cn: 1789 Capital 的 Abrahimzadeh 投资 SpaceX、Cerebras Ipos
summary: 1789 Capital Partner Paul Abrahimzadeh speaks to Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s AI Suppliers Can’t Keep Up as Component Shortages Bite
title_cn: 由于零部件短缺，中国的人工智能供应商无法跟上
summary: China’s artificial intelligence hardware suppliers have a problem: keeping up with insatiable demand for their products.

title: Alger CEO: AI Driving ‘Insatiable’ Demand for Memory
title_cn: Alger首席执行官：人工智能推动对内存“永不满足”的需求
summary: Alger CEO and CIO Dan Chung discusses AI investment in an interview with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Inflation Accelerates | The Close 5/12/2026
title_cn: 美国通胀加速|收盘价 2026 年 5 月 12 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Morgan Stanley Investment Management’s Jim Caron, Stifel Financial Chief Economist Dr. Lindsey Piegza, Deutsche Bank’s Michael Linenberg, TIAA’s CEO of Retirement Solutions, Kourtney Gibson, Cboe Global Markets’ Mandy Xu, Alger CEO & CIO Dan Chung, S3 Partners Managing Partner Bob Sloan, 1789 Capital Partner Paul Abrahimzadeh & Co-Founder & Chief Brand Officer of HUNDY! Aviv Schor (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CME to Create Futures Market for AI Computing Power
title_cn: CME将打造人工智能算力期货市场
summary:
Bloomberg reporters Silla Brush and Katherine Doherty break down how US derivatives exchange CME Group index provider Silicon Data are teaming up to create a futures market for the computing power that backs artificial intelligence infrastructure. 
Brush and Doherty report that a futures market would functionally set a price for computing power and say that the move signals to the rest of the industry that it is set to be a 'serious asset class.'  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Altman Testifies About ‘Hair-Raising’ OpenAI Chat With Musk
title_cn: Altman 就 OpenAI 与 Musk 的“令人毛骨悚然”的对话作证
summary: OpenAI’s Sam Altman testified that he was “extremely uncomfortable” with Elon Musk’s insistence that he have complete control over a proposed for-profit subsidiary of the startup back in 2017.

title: Most-Shorted US Stocks Led the Rally, S3's Sloan Says
title_cn: S3 的斯隆表示，做空最多的美国股票领涨
summary: "Risk is on and at higher levels," Bob Sloan, managing partner at S3 Partners, says when discusses short covering in US stocks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia CEO Pay Package Shrinks 27% on Smaller Stock Awards
title_cn: 因股票奖励减少，Nvidia CEO 薪酬缩减 27%
summary: The total pay package for Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang decreased 27% to $36.3 million in fiscal 2026 after the value of his stock awards declined.

title: Anthropic In Talks to Raise $30 Billion at $900 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Anthropic 正在洽谈融资 300 亿美元，估值达 9000 亿美元
summary: Anthropic PBC is in early talks with investors to raise at least $30 billion in fresh financing, according to people familiar with the matter, setting the stage for what could be its largest funding round yet.

title: ServiceNow US Bond Sale Draws $38 Billion of Investor Demand
title_cn: ServiceNow 美国债券发售吸引了 380 亿美元的投资者需求
summary: ServiceNow Inc.’s first US dollar bond sale since 2020 attracted demand nearly 10 times the deal’s size, defying concerns about the software firm’s vulnerability to artificial intelligence disruption.

title: Starmer to Meet Rival Streeting as Leadership Plot Stalls
title_cn: 斯塔默将与竞争对手街头会面，领导力阴谋陷入停滞
summary: Keir Starmer is due to confront one of his main rivals at a behind-closed-doors meeting on Wednesday morning, before the unveiling of a legislative agenda that many people in the ruling Labour Party don’t back the Prime Minister to deliver.

title: US, China Wrap Up Trade Talks in Seoul Before Trump Meets Xi
title_cn: 在特朗普会见习近平之前，美国和中国在首尔结束了贸易谈判
summary: Trade negotiators led by US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and China’s Vice Premier He Lifeng began talks in Seoul to prepare for this week’s summit between the leaders of the world’s two biggest economies.

title: Starmer Won’t Lead Labour Into Next Election, Unions Say
title_cn: 工会称斯塔默不会带领工党参加下一次选举
summary: Keir Starmer Photographer: Jason Alden/Bloomberg

title: Prof. Tim Bale on Starmer Future
title_cn: Tim Bale 教授谈 Starmer 未来
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer is "probably safe, at least for this morning and today", according to Tim Bale, Professor of Politics at Queen Mary University of London. Starmer is due to confront one of his main rivals, Health Secretary Wes Streeting, at a behind-closed-doors meeting today, before the unveiling of a legislative agenda that many people in the ruling Labour party don’t back the Prime Minister to deliver. A slew of ministerial resignations have so far failed to force Starmer’s downfall this week yet he faces another day of intense pressure. In an interview on Bloomberg Daybreak Europe, Bale said Starmer has managed, "to some extent, temporarily perhaps" to rally the Parliamentary Labour Party behind him, and that a challenge from Streeting is unlikely. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Debt Costs Rise
title_cn: 英国债务成本上升
summary: UK gilt yields have been rising in double-digits as political uncertainty mounts, with the prospect a more left-leaning government troubling investors. Bloomberg's Morwenna Coniam discusses with Lizzy Burden on "Daybreak Europe." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK's Starmer Survives as Potential Successors Bide Their Time
title_cn: 英国斯塔默幸存，潜在继任者等待时机
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer clung on to power even as some 90 Labour Party Members of Parliament called for him to step down. At a Downing Street meeting on Tuesday, Starmer told his Cabinet he wouldn’t discuss his future there, and that if ministers wanted to speak about his leadership they should come to him individually. The move was seen as effectively daring his opponents to come out and publicly challenge him. Bloomberg Opinion's Rosa Prince has the latest. Her views are her own. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alleged 1MDB Mastermind Jho Low Sought Presidential Pardon
title_cn: 涉嫌 1MDB 策划者刘特佐寻求总​​统赦免
summary: Jho Low, the Malaysian financier accused by the US of being the mastermind of one of the largest financial frauds in history, has sought a presidential pardon while he remains a fugitive.

title: Duterte vs. Marcos: Inside the Impeachment Shaking Philippine Politics
title_cn: 杜特尔特与马科斯：弹劾动摇菲律宾政治的内幕
summary: Political dynasties have long shaped the Philippines, where alliances can matter as much as policy. So when the country’s two most powerful families joined political forces in 2022 — with Ferdinand Marcos Jr. as president and Sara Duterte as vice president — a new era of stable politics looked promising.

title: Kharg Island Oil Jetties Empty in Sign of Iran Strain
title_cn: 哈格岛石油码头空无一人，这是伊朗紧张的迹象
summary: Oil shipments from Iran’s main export terminal appear to have come to a standstill over the past several days. European satellite imagery compiled by Bloomberg shows there were no ocean-going oil tankers observed at Kharg Island on May 8, 9 or 11. If Kharg Island were to remain idle, it would increase the pressure on the country's remaining storage facilities. Bloomberg's Stuart Livingstone-Wallace reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia's Huang Joins US Tech CEOs on Trump's China Trip
title_cn: 英伟达黄仁勋与美国科技公司首席执行官一起参加特朗普的中国之行
summary: Nvidia co-founder Jensen Huang joined US President Donald Trump on his visit to China as a last-minute addition to the trip, thrusting AI and technology into the spotlight before the high-stakes summit. Other US leaders on the trip include Apple's Tim Cook, Tesla’s Elon Musk, Boeing’s Kelly Ortberg and Goldman Sachs' David Solomon. Bloomberg's Minmin Low reports from Beijing. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia’s CEO Joins Trump in China With AI in the Spotlight
title_cn: 英伟达首席执行官与特朗普一起访问中国，人工智能成为人们关注的焦点
summary: Nvidia Corp. co-founder Jensen Huang joined US President Donald Trump on his visit to China as a last-minute addition, thrusting AI and technology into the spotlight before a high-stakes Beijing summit.

title: Pakistan Signals Turkey, Qatar May Join Saudi Defense Pact
title_cn: 巴基斯坦暗示土耳其和卡塔尔可能加入沙特防务条约
summary: Pakistan has indicated that Turkey and Qatar may join the nuclear-armed nation’s mutual defense cooperation pact with Saudi Arabia as the US-Iran war reshapes security alignment in the Middle East and South Asia.

title: Lawmakers Query Iran War Cost as Trump Renews Strike Threats
title_cn: 特朗普再次发出罢工威胁，议员质疑伊朗战争成本
summary: US lawmakers pressed Pentagon chiefs for details on the mounting costs of America’s deadlocked war with Iran, amid signs the conflict is pushing up consumer prices at home too. President Donald Trump said the Islamic Republic will be “decimated” if a deal can’t be reached.

title: Merz Coalition to Press Reforms as Meeting Yields Few Details
title_cn: 默茨联盟将推动改革，但会议没有透露多少细节
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s coalition resolved to press ahead with reform measures in the coming weeks after a six-hour meeting meant to regain traction with the public produced few concrete agreements.

title: Powell Wins Nebraska Democratic House Primary, DDHQ Projects
title_cn: 鲍威尔赢得内布拉斯加州民主党众议院初选、DDHQ 项目
summary: Denise Powell is projected to win the Democratic primary for Nebraska’s 2nd Congressional District, according to DDHQ.

title: Trump Faces Emboldened Xi in China as War Clips US Leverage
title_cn: 战争削弱了美国的影响力，特朗普在中国面临着更加大胆的习近平
summary: Donald Trump is expecting economic deals and a “wild” welcome this week in China. He’ll arrive facing an emboldened Xi Jinping, just as his own hand is constrained by the conflict in Iran.

title: US Soy Growers Want China Commitments as Season Slips Away
title_cn: 随着季节的流逝，美国大豆种植者希望中国做出承诺
summary: As US President Donald Trump travels to Beijing for a summit this week with his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping, American soybean farmers are in a now-familiar spot: Fields are getting planted when demand from their biggest customer is uncertain.

title: Lula Scraps Hated ‘Crop-Top Tax’ Ahead of Brazil Election
title_cn: 卢拉在巴西大选前废除了令人厌恶的“农作物税”
summary: Brazilian President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva scrapped a tax on imports valued at $50 or less, a measure likely to boost his popularity less than five months before the election.

title: Ricketts Wins Nebraska Senate Republican Primary, NBC Projects
title_cn: 里基茨赢得内布拉斯加州参议院共和党初选，NBC Projects
summary: Incumbent Senator Pete Ricketts is projected to win the Republican Senate primary in Nebraska, according to NBC.

title: Trump En Route to Beijing For Highly-Anticipated Summit | Balance of Power: Late Edition 05/12/2026
title_cn: 特朗普前往北京参加备受期待的峰会|权力平衡：最新版 05/12/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Representative Darrell Issa (R-CA), backs President Trump's push for a federal gas tax holiday, calling the 18-cent cut "symbolic" but still meaningful for consumers. Ivo Daadler, Harvard University Belfer Center Senior Fellow & former US Ambassador to NATO under the Obama Administration, discusses whether or not he sees diplomatic progress between US & Iran in the near future. Josh Lipsky, Vice President & Chair of International Economics at the Atlantic Council, suggests Iran will not be on the agenda when Presidents Trump & Xi meet because Trump wants to “come away with the visit with some deliverables.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Capito Wins GOP Senate Primary in West Virginia, NBC Projects
title_cn: 卡皮托在西弗吉尼亚州赢得共和党参议院初选，NBC Projects
summary: Incumbent Shelley Moore Capito, who was endorsed by President Trump, is projected to win the Republican Senate primary in West Virginia, according to NBC.

title: In A Game of Chicken: Daadler on US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 在一场“胆小鬼游戏”中：达德勒谈美伊谈判
summary: Ivo Daadler, Harvard University Belfer Center Senior Fellow & former US Ambassador to NATO under the Obama Administration, states that progress between US & Iran doesn’t seem likely in the near future because both sides are asking each other to “take a knee and give in.” He also suggest President Trump is underestimating the leverage Iran has, shares why he believes Steve Witkoff & Jared Kushner are not the right people to have nuclear negotiation talks with Iran, and the latest on Russia & Ukraine. Ivo Daalder speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Carolina Rejects Trump Pressure to Redraw Congress Map
title_cn: 南卡罗来纳州拒绝特朗普重绘国会地图的压力
summary: South Carolina’s Republican-led Senate rejected pressure from President Donald Trump to redraw the state’s congressional districts, a move that would have targeted one of the most senior Black Democrats on Capitol Hill.

title: Iran Possibly Not On Agenda: Lipsky on US-China Summit
title_cn: 利普斯基谈美中峰会：伊朗可能不在议程上
summary: Josh Lipsky, Vice President & Chair of International Economics at the Atlantic Council, suggests Iran will not be on the agenda when Presidents Trump & Xi meet because Trump wants to “come away with the visit with some deliverables.” Lipsky also talks about the impact China is feeling with the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, and if China comes into talks in a stronger position. Josh Lipsky speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tariff Refunds of $35.5 Billion Cleared for Importers So Far
title_cn: 迄今已为进口商办理了 355 亿美元的关税退税
summary: The Trump administration is in the process of issuing more than $35.5 billion to importers who successfully filed for tariff refunds after the US Supreme Court found the president’s signature economic policy unlawful, according to a new court filing.

title: Rep. Issa Backs Gas Tax Holiday Push
title_cn: 众议员伊萨支持汽油税假期推动
summary: Representative Darrell Issa (R-CA), Vice Chair of the House Foreign Affairs Committee and a member of the House Judiciary Committee, backs President Trump's push for a federal gas tax holiday, calling the 18-cent cut "symbolic" but still meaningful for consumers despite previously criticizing a similar proposal under the Biden administration. Issa also says China must be "part of the solution" to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and defends staying the course in the Iran conflict despite rising inflation and gas prices, arguing long-term peace outweighs short-term economic pain. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Power of Women's Wealth 'More Disruptive Than AI,' Says Morgan Stanley's Sherry Paul
title_cn: 摩根士丹利的雪莉·保罗表示，女性财富的力量“比人工智能更具破坏性”
summary: Sherry Paul, managing director at Morgan Stanley Private Wealth Management and private wealth advisor, said that the wealth held by women has the potential to reshape the economy and be 'more disruptive than AI.' Paul was joined by Bloomberg senior editor Claire Obusan to discuss her approach to growing wealth for women as they look for financial agency in a time of personal change such as divorce or death.  As part of the 'Women, Money, Power' segment Paul shared that her clients are looking for interdependent, collaborative relationships to build their wealth instead of traditional transactional trading.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic in Talks to Raise $30 Billion in New Funding
title_cn: Anthropic 正在洽谈筹集 300 亿美元新资金
summary: Anthropic is in early talks with investors to raise at least $30 billion in fresh financing, according to people familiar with the matter, setting the stage for what could be its largest funding round yet. Bloomberg's Kailey Leinz and Atlantic Council Geoeconomics Center Senior Director Josh Lipsky have more on "Balance of Power: Evening Edition." (Source: Bloomberg)
